application_deadlines.notes: Clark meets 100% of demonstrated need for Early Decision applicants.
Clark meets 100% of demonstrated need for Early Decision applicants.

supplemental_requirements.details: One optional 250-word essay. Applicants choose between two prompts focusing on either community impact or working with others to drive positive change.
One required 200-350 word essay about a piece of media that captivates the applicant and how they have pursued that interest.
Requires checking a box on the Common App, which unlocks two additional short essays.

holistic_factors.specific_differentiators: Clark values students who show an interest in global change, interdisciplinary learning, and making a social impact.
